title: limeum fenestratum
intro: Limeum fenestratum, also known as the "window-leaved limeum," is a perennial plant species belonging to the Limeum genus. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Limeum fenestratum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and its extracts can also be found in various commercial products.
